visual_description: A man in a brown jacket and dark pants walks away from a bicycle lying on a dirt road, heading toward a white pickup truck parked near a metal gate. He is partially visible from behind as he moves toward the truck, which has a wooden crate on its bed. The scene is set in a dry, rural area with sparse vegetation, a stone wall, and a building in the background under bright sunlight.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and pace, accompanied by a noticeable gasp.
